TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang mb'ala ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 142 buwan, 449 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 385 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 64 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 77%, Setik 5%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na mb'ala hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na mb'ala hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na mb'ala hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na mb'ala hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na mb'ala hya' ga nakahara. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mβʔala ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, ʦ~ʨou *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mβʔala ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mβʔala ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mβʔala ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mβʔala ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mβʔala ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħara. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang mb'ala ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 142 buwan, 449 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 385 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 64 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 77%, Setik 5%, Bunun 2%, Amis 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na mb'ala hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na mb'ala hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na mb'ala hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na mb'ala hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na mb'ala hya' ga nakahara. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mβʔala ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, ʦ~ʨou *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mβʔala ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mβʔala ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mβʔala ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mβʔala ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na mβʔala ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħara. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
